# StayEase - Hotel Management System

## Project Overview
React-based hotel management system with a beautiful login page featuring:
- User authentication with role selection
- Gradient purple/blue UI design
- Responsive hotel management dashboard
- TypeScript support for type safety

## Setup and Development

### Prerequisites
- Node.js 16+
- npm or yarn

### Installation
```bash
npm install
```

### Development Server
```bash
npm run dev
```

### Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
```

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/          # Reusable UI components
│   ├── LoginPage.tsx   # Login page component
│   └── Navigation.tsx  # Top navigation
├── pages/              # Page components
├── styles/             # Global styles and themes
├── App.tsx             # Main app component
└── main.tsx            # Entry point
```

## Features
- Login page with email and password authentication
- Role selection dropdown (User/Admin)
- Register link for new users
- Professional gradient background
- Responsive design
